classes.reasoning: Document explicitly identifies itself as 'IB-004 — Investigator Brochure' in the header and contains comprehensive drug information including efficacy data, pharmacogenomic guidance, safety information (falls risk), and biomarker data for BRC-209 (Velagostat).

summary: This is Edition 2 of the Investigator Brochure for BRC-209 (Velagostat), dated 20 January 2023, superseding Edition 1 from 10 January 2022. The document provides comprehensive information about the investigational drug including updated 18-month Phase II extension efficacy data, new biomarker findings (plasma p-tau 181 and NfL), pharmacogenomic guidance for CYP2C19 poor metabolizers, and updated falls risk assessment guidance.
